title: Brazilian Chicken Casserole
description: A flavorful and spicy casserole dish with a sweet Brazilian twist, perfect for a weeknight dinner.
instructions: In a large skillet, cook the spicy sausage over medium-high heat, breaking it up with a spoon as it cooks.
Add the diced onion and bell pepper to the skillet and cook until the vegetables are tender.
In a large mixing bowl, combine the cooked rice, chicken, and sweet casserole sauce.
Stir in the cooked sausage and vegetable mixture.
Transfer the mixture to a 9x13 inch baking dish and cover with aluminum foil.
Bake for 25 minutes, then remove the foil and continue baking for an additional 10-15 minutes, or until the casserole is hot and bubbly.
Remove from the oven and garnish with chopped cilantro, if desired.
